final:
// // This module implements a 8-bit DRAM cell with write and read functionality. It has inputs for write enable (we), data input (data_in), and address (addr), and outputs for data output (data_out). The cell supports one clock cycle for both write and read operations.
module DRAM_Cell (
    input wire clk,
    input wire we,
    input wire [7:0] data_in,
    input wire [2:0] addr,
    output reg [7:0] data_out
);
    reg [7:0] memory [0:7]; // 8x8-bit memory

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (we) begin
            memory[addr] <= data_in; // Write operation
        end
        data_out <= memory[addr]; // Read operation
    end
endmodule
